block_01: Stop Loss and Take Profit levels are uncomplicated tools that may help you cut losses while securing potential profits. Any trader, regardless of their level of experience, may consider implementing them in their trading routine as they are one of the main methods of money management.
block_02: How to decide where to set the Stop Loss and Take Profit? What are the pros and cons of using them in daily trading? How to calculate the levels depending on the investment and what additional features are available? Answers to all these questions and many more can be found in this week’s material.
block_03: If you wish to learn how to properly manage the risks associated with trading, check the full article below.
